---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement.
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## IMPORTANT

Before submitting a feature request:

1) Ensure a similar feature request does not already exist.
2) Make sure the requested feature aligns with the goals of this project.

## Feature Description

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Motivation

Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it would solve.

## Proposed Implementation

Describe any ideas you have for how this feature could be implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Information

Add any other relevant details, screenshots, examples, or references.
